project.name: inventory-control
project.description: Agent-native local-first personal inventory CLI for warranty-aware item tracking, document attachments, service events, reminders, and evidence export workflows.

nodes.summary: Configuration file used to control tooling or runtime behavior.

layers.description: Repository documentation, specs, and skill guidance.

layers.description: Build, toolchain, and CI configuration files.

layers.description: Core inventory domain entities and business rules.

tour.title: Project Overview
tour.description: Start with repository documentation to understand scope, constraints, and user-facing workflows.

tour.title: CLI Entry Flow
tour.description: Follow how command parsing starts and routes to concrete inventory operations.

tour.title: Domain Contracts
tour.description: Inspect domain schemas and warranty logic that enforce invariants for item and service data.

tour.title: Chat Intake Parsing
tour.description: Review natural-language intake parsing for command drafts and intent resolution.

tour.title: Application Services
tour.description: See use-case orchestration for items, documents, reminders, service events, and evidence exports.

tour.title: Persistence Adapters
tour.description: Compare JSON and SQLite adapters and inspect schema/database setup.

tour.title: Attachment Storage
tour.description: Understand local attachment handling and document storage integration points.

tour.title: Behavior Verification
tour.description: Use the test suite to confirm domain rules, command contracts, and adapter behavior.
